title: Postgres CPU > 90% for 5m
question: Postgres CPU is high on prod-db-1 — which runbook should I follow?
actions: Run pg_stat_activity to list long-running queries
Follow database_connectivity_runbook.md for pool and connectivity checks
Check for missing indexes (seq_scan vs idx_scan)
Escalate to DBA if CPU stays above 90% for 15 minutes
decision_reason: Known runbook with deterministic steps. Tier-1 on-call can resolve without paging a DBA.

title: API 5xx rate 12% for 4m
question: What should I do when the API gateway returns elevated 5xx errors after a deploy?
actions: Confirm 5xx spike correlates with the last deploy timestamp
Tail gateway and upstream service logs for ERROR patterns
Open incident channel and page service owner if error rate persists
decision_reason: Customer revenue at risk. Assistant prepares rollback steps and escalation path — engineer confirms and pages.

title: P95 latency above SLO for 10m
question: How do I investigate payment service latency spikes?
actions: Compare P95 against historical baseline for this time window
Check downstream dependency health and error rates
Snooze alert if pattern matches known traffic spike
decision_reason: Often traffic-shaped. Historical pattern suggests monitoring before paging if dependencies are healthy.
